cookbooks.title: Getting Started with Semantic Caching
cookbooks.lead: Build a semantic cache that stores LLM responses and returns cached answers for semantically similar prompts — cutting costs by 60%+ and latency from seconds to milliseconds.

cookbooks.title: Multi-Turn Conversation Caching
cookbooks.lead: Cache not just single prompts, but full conversation contexts. When a user asks a follow-up question in a similar conversation flow, return the cached response instead of calling the LLM again.

cookbooks.title: Production Patterns
cookbooks.lead: Similarity threshold tuning, cache hit rate monitoring, eviction strategies, TTL management, and cost tracking for production semantic caches.
